summary: Phase 2 backend refactoring regression testing completed successfully. All 8 extracted route modules are working correctly. 37/38 tests passed, 1 skipped due to test data issue (non-admin user missing hashed_password in database - not a code regression).

minor.issue: Non-admin test user 'teste@email.com' has no hashed_password in database - data issue, not code regression

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 2 refactoring successfully extracted 8 route modules from server.py (reduced from 12,975 to 10,097 lines = 2,878 lines extracted)
All route modules properly import from shared modules (database.py, auth_utils.py, models.py)
Router prefixes correctly configured: clientes=/clientes, equipamentos=/equipamentos, notifications=/notifications, company-info=/company-info, references has no prefix
All routers included in api_router which has /api prefix, so full paths work correctly
Lazy imports used in notifications.py and pedidos_cotacao.py to avoid circular dependencies - working correctly

non_admin.note: User exists but may not have password set

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Phase2_* clients and equipamentos during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 backend refactoring regression tests complete. All 8 extracted route modules verified working: auth_routes.py (login, register, me, forgot-password, change-password), clientes.py (CRUD + PDF export), equipamentos.py (CRUD + intervention history), notifications.py (CRUD + push + VAPID), pedidos_cotacao.py (PC management + photos + invoices), company_info.py (get/update company info), tabelas_tarifas.py (price tables + tariffs CRUD), references.py (internal reference system). Endpoints still in server.py also verified: relatorios-tecnicos, services, time-entries.

tests: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user info with valid token
GET /api/clientes - Returns list of active clients
GET /api/tabelas-preco - Returns list of price tables
GET /api/admin/reference-tokens - Returns list of reference tokens

extracted_modules_summary.routes/auth_routes.py: Auth endpoints (login, register, me, forgot-password, change-password)
